---
pagetitle: "Yesmine Ayeb"
title-block-style: none
toc: false
---

# Welcome to my personal website!

I am Yesmine Ayeb, an Agronomy Engineer currently pursuing an MSc in Horticultural Genetics & Biotechnology at CIHEAM MAICh in Chania, Greece.

My background combines horticultural production and plant molecular biology. Through my studies and research experiences, I have developed a strong interest in plant responses to stress and the phytomicrobibome, although I am often intrigued by a variety of other plant-related topics too.

This website is still under construction and getting updated in the rare free moments I have (aka waiting for incubation to finish). If you have any feedback, please don't hesitate to reach out.

**Contact** \
*Email:* [ayeb.yesmine@gmail.com](mailto:ayeb.yesmine@gmail.com)  
*LinkedIn:* [linkedin.com/in/yesmine-ayeb](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yesmine-ayeb)  
*Bluesky:* [@lyrsei.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/lyrsei.bsky.social)
